data.title: US tech firm Coupang named one of 2026 LexisNexis' Top 100 Innovators for 2nd year in a row. Leading in digital services.
data.description: Coupang, a prominent tech company based in the U.S., has been recognized by LexisNexis as one of the top 100 global innovators for 2026, marking the second consecutive year the company has received this honor. This achievement showcases Coupang's strong presence and impact in the digital services sector.

data.title: SCHMID provides InfinityLine H+ for panel packaging formats up to 700x700mm to major U.S. tech firm.
data.description: SCHMID has successfully delivered its inaugural InfinityLine H+ system for panel level packaging to a top technology firm in the United States. This specialized equipment is capable of handling formats as large as 700×700mm.

data.title: Halifax Group wins BluWave 2026 Top PE Innovator Award, recognizing top 2% of most innovative private equity firms in North America.
data.description: Halifax Group ("Halifax") was awarded the prestigious BluWave 2026 Top PE Innovator Award, placing them among the top 2% of private equity firms in North America. The award, which highlights innovation in the sector, was announced in Washington on March 4, 2026. The recognition underscores Halifax's cutting-edge strategies and positions them as a leading player in the industry.

data.title: BluWave awards 105 private equity firms for modern growth practices in 2026, 5th annual awards.
data.description: A total of 105 pioneering private equity firms have been recognized by BluWave in their fifth annual 2026 Top Private Equity Innovator Awards held in Nashville, Tennessee.

data.title: JZXN to acquire 10,000 BTC worth US$1 billion from global investor, strengthening partnership.
data.description: On March 04, 2026, Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: JZXN) revealed a significant strategic partnership with a leading global digital asset investor. The agreement entails the transfer of 10,000 Bitcoins (BTC) to JZXN from the investor in exchange for equity worth about US$1 billion. This deal marks a milestone as the companies forge a lasting partnership to enhance cooperation within the worldwide cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Cellectar Biosciences reports financial results for year ended 2025: on track to submit iopofosine I 131 for EU approval in Q3 2026 for potential commercialization in 2027 for Waldenström Macroglobulinemia.
data.description: Expected to request Conditional Marketing Authorization for iopofosine I 131 to the European Medicines Agency in the third quarter of 2026, aiming for potential commercialization in the European Union in 2027. This medication is intended for treating Waldenström Macroglobulinemia.

data.title: OpsGuru joins AWS Managed Services Provider Program for operational excellence, driving cloud operations and AI innovation.
data.description: OpsGuru, based in Toronto, disclosed today that it has achieved the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Managed Services Provider Program certification, placing it among a limited number of partners acknowledged for their operational proficiency. This designation acknowledges OpsGuru for its demonstrated track record in effectively managing AWS services. The achievement marks a significant milestone for OpsGuru in solidifying its position as a leading AWS managed services provider.
